title: Plagiobothrys nitens
taxonomy: Plagiobothrys nitens is classified as a species of flowering plant in the family Boraginaceae, commonly known as the borage or forget-me-not family. This annual herb is native to the western coast of North America. Plagiobothrys nitens is a member of the genus Plagiobothrys, which is a group of small, annual herbs. The plant is often found in grasslands and open woodlands. Plagiobothrys nitens is also known as bright spikelet or bright spike lettuce.
